rationale: The cited paper develops a selection-corrected Tobit methodology linking acquisition and retention under truncation/censoring, which is directly relevant to the citing paper’s stated focus on exogeneity/endogeneity, model adequacy, and diagnostics for policy-relevant econometric models. Also, the cited article is a 2001 JMR paper within the 1998–2003 window that the citing paper explicitly reviews, so this citation could reflect substantive methodological use (or evaluative discussion) rather than a purely incidental mention.
